raw.message: Hey, come and solve this tricky puzzle! I'm stuck with this level!

hook.summary: A player attempts a difficult level and immediately fails by crashing a bus.
hook.visual_action: A hand cursor moves a purple bus, then crashes a red bus into a green one.
hook.text_overlay: WHY THIS LEVEL IS SO HARD, CAN YOU WIN?

scene_flow: Gameplay starts with a challenge question and a crowded bus lot.
Player attempts to move buses to match passenger colors but repeatedly crashes.
A large 'FAIL' overlay appears as the player makes a critical error.
Final end card displays the game title and a call to action.
on_screen_text: WHY THIS LEVEL IS SO HARD, CAN YOU WIN?
audience_proxy: Casual mobile gamers who enjoy satisfying sorting and logic puzzles.
